chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-561 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1926/19 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of MA 2558/17 4. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2019 Petitioner present in person. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Petitioner after arguing at some length and while referring to Rule-C of the Public School Mirpurkhas Service and Conduct Rules submits that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition if the directions are issued to the respondents to pay him remaining amount towards C.P Fund. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed alongwith application listed at serial No.3. However, if there are any dues of the petitioner in respect of C.P Fund, the same may be paid to him in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
